name: How long to hear back on my Utah work comp claim?

mainEntity.name: How long to hear back on my Utah work comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Insurer must decide within 21 days of reports, or 45 with extension request.[1][2] Delays possible but appealable. Key factors: Complete employer/doctor reports. Practical guidance: Follow up after 21 days; call Division if needed. Quick reports speed it.[2] Benefits start if accepted.[1]
